title: AN ACT DECLARING AUGUST 11 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF ILIGAN, PROVINCE OF ISABELA IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS CHARTER DAY ANNIVERSARY TO BE KNOWN AS âILIGAN CITY CHARTER DAYâ

chunks.text:
H. No. 4798 ; Manila Bulletin (May 2, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10768, April 26, 2016 ]

AN ACT DECLARING AUGUST 11 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF ILIGAN, PROVINCE OF ISABELA IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS CHARTER DAY ANNIVERSARY TO BE KNOWN AS âILIGAN CITY CHARTER DAYâ

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. August 11 of every year is declared a special working holiday in the City of Ilagan, Province of Isabela in commemoration of its Charter Day Anniversary to be known as âIlagan City Charter Dayâ. When the holiday fells on a Saturday or a Sunday, the special working day shall be observed on the Monday that follows.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on August 26, 2014, amended by the Senate on December 14, 2015, and which amendments were concurred in by the House Representatives on January 25, 2016.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 26 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
